---
title: "Desertlike Dark Africangoldencat"
authors:
  - name: "ChristianGuggemos"
    url: "https://github.com/ChristianGuggemos"
  - name: "ColinVogl"
    url: "https://github.com/ColinVogl"
  - name: "AmyFunk"
    url: "https://github.com/AmyFunk"
authors_links: "[ChristianGuggemos](https://github.com/ChristianGuggemos), [ColinVogl](https://github.com/ColinVogl), [AmyFunk](https://github.com/AmyFunk)"
rank: 4
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="group_desertlike_dark_africangoldencat_screencast.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**
